t(f"2024年收入基准: ${revenue_2024/1e9:.2f}B")
print(f"2024年毛利率: {gross_margin_2024*100:.1f}%")

# 计算2026年收入 (30% CAGR, 2年)
revenue_2026 = revenue_2024 * (1.30 ** 2)
print(f"2026年收入 (30% CAGR): ${revenue_2026/1e9:.2f}B")

# 毛利率压缩500bps = 5%
gross_margin_2026 = gross_margin_2024 - 0.05
print(f"2026年毛利率 (压缩500bps): {gross_margin_2026*100:.1f}%")

# 计算2026年毛利润
gross_profit_2026 = revenue_2026 * gross_margin_2026
print(f"\n=== 2026年毛利润预测: ${gross_profit_2026/1e6:.1f}M ===")
print(f"即: ${gross_profit_2026/1e9:.2f}B")
```

# 2024 baseline
revenue_2024 = 1.638159e9  # $1.638B
gross_margin_2024 = 0.2589  # 25.89%

# Task parameters
cagr = 0.30  # 30% CAGR
margin_compression = 0.05  # 500bps = 5%

# Calculate 2026 revenue (2 years of 30% growth)
revenue_2026 = revenue_2024 * (1 + cagr) ** 2
print(f"2024 Revenue: ${revenue_2024/1e9:.3f}B")
print(f"2026 Revenue (30% CAGR, 2yr): ${revenue_2026/1e9:.3f}B")

# Calculate 2026 gross margin (500bps compression)
gross_margin_2026 = gross_margin_2024 - margin_compression
print(f"2024 Gross Margin: {gross_margin_2024*100:.2f}%")
print(f"2026 Gross Margin (-500bps): {gross_margin_2026*100:.2f}%")

# Calculate 2026 gross profit
gross_profit_2026 = revenue_2026 * gross_margin_2026
print(f"\n2026 Gross Profit: ${gross_profit_2026/1e6:.1f}M")
print(f"2026 Gross Profit: ${gross_profit_2026/1e9:.3f}B")
